# Aamerican Colleges of Jiu-Jitsu and Karate

Aamerican Colleges of Jiu-Jitsu and Karate is a martial arts school in Henrico, VA offering Aam-Ka Jiu-Jitsu, Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, Aikido, After-School & Summer Camp for kids, teens, and adults.

## About
Aamerican Colleges of Jiu-Jitsu and Karate has been a cornerstone of the Henrico community, building confident, disciplined students through authentic martial arts training.

## Programs
- Aam-Ka Jiu-Jitsu
- Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu
- Aikido
- After-School & Summer Camp

## Location
11250 Patterson Ave
Henrico, VA 23238

## Contact
Phone: (804) 651-9388
Website: https://rvaselfdefense.com

## Reviews
40 5-star Google reviews. Rating: 4.7/5.0
